title: Moldova's President Maia Sandu visiting Latvia
summary_full: On April 1st, Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs will play host to President of Moldova Maia Sandu at Rīga Castle.
summary_public: On April 1st, Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs will play host to President of Moldova Maia Sandu at Rīga Castle.
